channel.title: AI Research & Trends
channel.description: Daily AI research, local model optimization, and autonomous systems analysis.

item.title: Mid-Tier BIM Tools: The $1.2B Gap in MEP CAD Markets
item.description:
# Mid-Tier BIM Tools: The $1.2B Gap in MEP CAD Markets
The construction industry is facing a critical inflection point. While Autodesk and Trimble dominate the MEP CAD space with AI-driven tools, a $1.2B gap exists for mid-tier solutions

item.title: EU AI Regulations Force Major Shift in 2026: Generic AI Tools Losing Ground

item.title: AI Research Digest — 2026-04-02

item.title: 40% Compliance Savings: EU AI Rules Force Ethical Audits in 2026
item.description:
# 40% Compliance Savings: EU AI Rules Force Ethical Audits in 2026
New EU regulations are mandating transparency in AI decision-making, and developers who integrate ethical audits early are cutting compliance costs by 40%.
